plan_kts:
fun plan(repository: String, issueNumber: Int, specPath: String): SpecSolvesIssueVerdict {
    val repoReadme = readFile(".repo_context/README.md")
    val repoIndex = readFile(".repo_context/index.md")
    val repoMaintenance = readFile(".repo_context/maintenance.md")
    val generatedIndex = readFile(".repo_context/generated/repo_index.md")
    val engineeringPrinciples = readFile(".repo_context/modules/overview/engineering-principles.md")
    val issue = readGitHubIssue(repository = repository, issueNumber = issueNumber)
    val issueComments = readGitHubIssueComments(repository = repository, issueNumber = issueNumber)
    val spec = readFile(specPath)
    val referencedPaths = extractReferencedSourcePaths(spec)
    val sourceEvidence = readRepositoryFiles(referencedPaths)
    val issueRequirements = extractIssueRequirements(issue, issueComments)
    val specCommitments = extractSpecCommitments(spec)
    val sourceBackedSpecClaims = confirmClaimsAgainstSource(specCommitments, sourceEvidence)
    val scopeComparison = compareRequirementCoverage(issueRequirements, sourceBackedSpecClaims)
    val riskAssessment = assessUncoveredRequirements(scopeComparison, engineeringPrinciples)
    val verdict = buildSpecSolvesIssueVerdict(scopeComparison, riskAssessment, repoReadme, repoIndex, repoMaintenance, generatedIndex)
    return verdict
}
